home-loads.name: Home page loads
home-loads.description: Home page renders with main heading visible

home-to-blog.name: Navigate from home to blog detail
home-to-blog.description: User clicks 'Read blogs' on home page and navigates to a blog detail

home-to-catalog.name: Navigate from home to catalog/product
home-to-catalog.description: User clicks 'Shop now' on home page and navigates to catalog then product detail

home-product-carousel.name: Navigate through product carousel
home-product-carousel.description: User clicks a product from the home page carousel and reaches the detail page

auth-sign-in-form.name: Sign-in form display and interaction
auth-sign-in-form.description: User navigates to sign-in page, sees form fields and can type in them

auth-login-invalid.name: Login with invalid credentials
auth-login-invalid.description: User submits invalid credentials and stays on sign-in page

auth-protected-redirect.name: Protected route redirect
auth-protected-redirect.description: Unauthenticated user accessing /dashboard or /backoffice is redirected to sign-in

blog-list-view.name: View blog listing
blog-list-view.description: User views the /blogs page and sees blog cards

blog-detail-view.name: View blog detail
blog-detail-view.description: User clicks a blog card and views the detail page with matching title

blog-detail-back.name: Navigate back from blog detail
blog-detail-back.description: User uses browser back from blog detail and returns to blogs list

navigation-between-pages.name: Navigate between main sections
navigation-between-pages.description: User navigates across home, catalog, blogs, checkout, and sign-in pages

navigation-header.name: Working header navigation
navigation-header.description: Header/nav element exists and contains navigation links

navigation-footer.name: Working footer
navigation-footer.description: Footer element is visible on the home page

catalog-browse.name: Browse product catalog
catalog-browse.description: User visits /catalog and sees product cards

catalog-product-detail.name: View product detail
catalog-product-detail.description: User navigates to a product detail page and sees title and price

catalog-product-gallery.name: Product gallery images
catalog-product-gallery.description: Product detail page displays at least one image

catalog-back-navigation.name: Navigate back to catalog
catalog-back-navigation.description: User uses browser back from product detail and returns to /catalog

cart-add.name: Add product to cart
cart-add.description: User adds a product from detail page to cart; cart is not empty on checkout

cart-empty.name: Empty cart state
cart-empty.description: Cart page shows 'Tu carrito está vacío' when no items are in cart

cart-update-qty.name: Update product quantity in cart
cart-update-qty.description: User updates the quantity input for a cart item

cart-remove.name: Remove product from cart
cart-remove.description: User removes a product from cart and sees empty cart message

cart-subtotal.name: Cart subtotal calculation
cart-subtotal.description: Checkout page shows a visible Subtotal label when cart has items

cart-persist.name: Cart persists across page reloads
cart-persist.description: Cart items survive a full page reload

cart-multiple-products.name: Add multiple different products
cart-multiple-products.description: User adds two different products; both appear in checkout cart

checkout-form-display.name: Checkout form display
checkout-form-display.description: Checkout page renders with form fields visible

checkout-form-validation.name: Checkout form required field validation
checkout-form-validation.description: Submit button is disabled when checkout form is empty

checkout-form-fill.name: Accept valid checkout data
checkout-form-fill.description: User fills all checkout form fields with valid data

purchase-complete-flow.name: Complete full purchase flow
purchase-complete-flow.description: End-to-end: home → catalog → product detail → add to cart → checkout → fill form → submit enabled

purchase-multiple-items.name: Checkout with multiple cart items
purchase-multiple-items.description: User adds two products and both appear in checkout with subtotal visible

purchase-disabled-empty-cart.name: Checkout disabled when cart is empty
purchase-disabled-empty-cart.description: Even with form filled, checkout button is disabled when cart is empty

purchase-loading-state.name: Loading state during form submission
purchase-loading-state.description: Submit button triggers loading/navigation state after click

auth-sign-up-form.name: Sign-up form display and validation
auth-sign-up-form.description: User navigates to /sign-up and sees registration form with client-side validation

auth-forgot-password-form.name: Forgot password form display
auth-forgot-password-form.description: User navigates to /forgot-password and sees email input and send code button

peluch-detail-size-color-selection.name: Select size and color on peluch detail
peluch-detail-size-color-selection.description: User picks a size from size_prices and a color from available_colors; price updates accordingly

peluch-detail-personalization-huella.name: Configure huella personalization
peluch-detail-personalization-huella.description: User opens huella section, selects type (name/date/letter/image), fills text or uploads image, extra cost shown

peluch-detail-personalization-corazon.name: Configure corazón personalization
peluch-detail-personalization-corazon.description: User opens corazón section, enters phrase (max 50 chars), extra cost added to total

peluch-detail-personalization-audio.name: Upload audio personalization
peluch-detail-personalization-audio.description: User opens audio section and uploads an audio file; media_id stored before adding to cart

checkout-wompi-redirect.name: Checkout redirects to Wompi
checkout-wompi-redirect.description: After POST /api/orders/ succeeds, frontend clears cart and redirects browser to checkout_url from response

orders-list-view.name: View my orders list
orders-list-view.description: Authenticated user navigates to /orders and sees their order cards with status badges

tracking-by-order-number.name: Track order by number
tracking-by-order-number.description: User enters order number on /tracking, fetches GET /api/orders/track/:number/, timeline updates to current status

tracking-auto-from-wompi.name: Auto-load tracking after Wompi redirect
tracking-auto-from-wompi.description: Wompi redirects to /tracking?order=PELUCH-XXXX; page auto-searches that order number and shows timeline

auth-login-success.name: Successful sign-in and redirect
auth-login-success.description: User submits valid credentials, receives JWT tokens, and is redirected to home/dashboard

auth-logout.name: Sign out
auth-logout.description: Authenticated user clicks Sign Out; tokens cleared from cookies; redirected to home or sign-in

auth-google-login.name: Google OAuth login
auth-google-login.description: User clicks Google button on sign-in page, completes OAuth, receives JWT, redirected to dashboard

auth-session-persistence.name: Session persistence across reload
auth-session-persistence.description: User with valid cookies navigates to a protected route and remains authenticated after reload

auth-registration-verify.name: Email verification after sign-up
auth-registration-verify.description: After sign-up, user enters verification code sent to email and account is activated

app-dashboard-access.name: Dashboard access (authenticated)
app-dashboard-access.description: Authenticated user navigates to /dashboard and sees dashboard content without redirect

payment-page-display.name: Payment page display
payment-page-display.description: After order created, user lands on /payment and sees available payment methods (Wompi widget or method list)

order-confirmed-display.name: Order confirmed page
order-confirmed-display.description: After successful Wompi payment, /order-confirmed renders order number and success message

review-submit.name: Submit peluch review
review-submit.description: Authenticated user with a delivered order fills rating and comment on peluch detail and submits POST /api/peluches/{slug}/reviews/

backoffice-login.name: Admin login via /admin-login
backoffice-login.description: Staff navigates to /admin-login, submits credentials, receives JWT, is redirected to /backoffice

backoffice-dashboard-display.name: Backoffice dashboard display
backoffice-dashboard-display.description: Authenticated staff sees /backoffice dashboard with analytics widgets (orders, revenue, top peluches)

backoffice-order-management.name: Backoffice order management
backoffice-order-management.description: Staff on /backoffice/pedidos views order list and updates status via PATCH /api/orders/{number}/status/

backoffice-peluch-list.name: Backoffice peluch list
backoffice-peluch-list.description: Staff views /backoffice/peluches with all peluches in a table; can navigate to detail or create new

backoffice-peluch-create.name: Backoffice create peluch
backoffice-peluch-create.description: Staff on /backoffice/peluches/nuevo fills PeluchForm and submits POST /api/peluches/

backoffice-peluch-edit.name: Backoffice edit peluch
backoffice-peluch-edit.description: Staff on /backoffice/peluches/[slug] edits fields and submits PATCH /api/peluches/{slug}/

backoffice-category-management.name: Backoffice category management
backoffice-category-management.description: Staff on /backoffice/categorias creates, edits, or deletes a category via categoryAdminService

backoffice-user-management.name: Backoffice user management
backoffice-user-management.description: Staff on /backoffice/usuarios views user list and updates role/staff/active via userAdminService

contact-page-display.name: Contact page display
contact-page-display.description: User navigates to /contact and sees contact form or contact information

about-page-display.name: About page display
about-page-display.description: User navigates to /about and sees the brand history/story content

terms-page-display.name: Terms and conditions display
terms-page-display.description: User navigates to /terms and sees the terms and conditions content
